text:
FreeBSD FBSD14 14.0-STABLE FreeBSD 14.0-STABLE #8 stable/14-8788c3d3f: Wed Jan 24 11:47:39 EST 2024     root@FBSD14:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/MYKERNEL amd64 1400506

After recent ports updates, atril fails to start with the following error:

# atril
ld-elf.so.1: /usr/local/lib/libtasn1.so.6: version LIBTASN1_0_3 required by /usr/local/lib/libwebkit2gtk-4.0.so.37 not defined
